productDisplayName: Tantra Men People Talk Peach T-shirt
description: Composition Peach round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has peach fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline and graphic print on the front with lettering Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery With anti-corruption becoming the latest fad, this peach t-shirt from tantra will give you the opportunity to tell the world what you stand for. The graphic print very clearly states that you can't silence people when they realize that the government is taking them for a ride. Hail democracy! Pair it with jeans or shorts for a perfectly casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
